title: Meghalaya Board MBOSE Class 10, 12 Date Sheet 2026 (Out) @ mbose.in Meghalaya Board of School Education

detail.title: Meghalaya Board MBOSE Class 10, 12 Date Sheet 2026 (Out) @ mbose.in Meghalaya Board of School Education
detail.short_info: Meghalaya Board of School Education has released the MBOSE Class 10, 12. Students can access their Meghalaya Board Result 2026 using their registration number through the direct link here.

sections.heading: Meghalaya Board MBOSE Class 10, 12 Date Sheet 2026 (Out) @ mbose.in Meghalaya Board of School Education

content.text: Meghalaya Board of School Education officials have released Meghalaya Board of School Education Exam Date Sheet 2026. Furthermore, the Meghalaya Board Date Sheet 2026 for MBOSE Class 10, 12 was announced 10th Class (30-01-2026 to 11-02-2026) and 12th Class (18-02-2026 to 13-03-2026) by the administration.

Meghalaya Board of School Education Exam Schedule 2026 may be found by clicking on the link at the bottom of the page. All candidates should keep in mind that as Meghalaya Board of School Education Sem Exam Date Sheet 2026 is released, we will update the links.

sections.heading: Important Details Meghalaya Board MBOSE Class 10, 12 Date Sheet 2026

rows: Health & Physical Education / Computer Science / Vocational Subject
Economics / Physics / Poultry Farming-IV / Computer Technique-IV

sections.heading: How to Download the Meghalaya Board MBOSE Class 10, 12 Date Sheet 2026?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download Meghalaya Board of School Education Date Sheet 2026, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.
